description: Known-bad fixture: source document containing one deliberately orphaned bullet (no LT in lt_set.json covers it). Plus four normal bullets matching the known-good set.
bullets: Identify prime numbers and composite numbers within 100.
Find the prime factorisation of whole numbers up to 100.
Compute the greatest common divisor of two whole numbers.
Explain why the greatest common divisor is useful when simplifying fractions.
Solve word problems involving ratio and proportion in practical contexts.

expected_flags.notes: Bullet 4 (ratio/proportion word problems) has no matching LT in lt_set.json. Gate validate_source_coverage.py must flag this bullet.
